command: grep -Eq '^merge_ready: yes$' outputs/sdk/core/promotion.md && grep -Eq '^manual_proof_pending: no$' outputs/sdk/core/promotion.md && grep -Eq '^quality_ready: yes$' outputs/sdk/core/quality.md && grep -Eq '^placeholder_debt: no$' outputs/sdk/core/quality.md && grep -Eq '^warning_debt: no$' outputs/sdk/core/quality.md && grep -Eq '^artifact_mismatch_risk: no$' outputs/sdk/core/quality.md && grep -Eq '^manual_followup_required: no$' outputs/sdk/core/quality.md
